title: Madras HC orders CBI probe into transformer tender scam during V Senthil Balaji’s tenure as Electricity Minister
description: The Madras High Court on Wednesday ordered the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) to probe the alleged irregularities in transformer tenders issued during the tenure of former Electricity Minister V Senthil Balaji [Arapor Iyakkam Vs Director].A Bench of Chief Justice SA Dharmadikari and Justice Arul Murugan ordered that the entire investigation be transferred to the CBI.“The investigation pertaining to the complaints lodged by the petitioners are hereby transferred to the Central Bureau of In
